Name: gpio.intr_gpio_o
Description: Exports interrupt signals (32-bit) from the GPIO interrupt hardware to the integration/system level to indicate pin events or conditions.

Name: gpio.cio_gpio_en_o
Description: Per-pin output-enable vector that controls whether each GPIO pin is actively driven or tri-stated.

Name: gpio.u_reg.reg_we
Description: Write-enable strobe for the TileLink register interface; when asserted with a valid address hit and byte enables, it qualifies acceptance of write data into the targeted register.

Name: gpio.u_reg.reg_re
Description: Read-enable strobe for the TileLink register interface; when asserted with an address hit, it initiates the muxing and return of read data for the addressed register.

Name: gpio.u_reg.reg_error
Description: Per-access error flag for the TileLink register interface that reports address misses, integrity/parity failures, or protocol violations during register transactions.

Name: gpio.u_reg.intg_err_o
Description: This output signals that an integrity error has been detected (either incoming payload integrity failure or internal write-enable error) and is used for alert generation externally.

Name: gpio.u_reg.err_q
Description: err_q latches the occurrence of an integrity-related error (intg_err or reg_we_err) and makes the error persistent across cycles for use by alerting logic.
